title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that holds a mighty flame in the palm of your hand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 58 pages to mark the end of this magnificent spin-off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Even in this day and age?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yup! I'm not interested in the pirate King's leftovers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All I care about is taking the top! Nothing else.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're aiming for the King without any real reason. A journey without a purpose...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are blazed through the ocean, his impatience burning through his body...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I think back to the look on your face back then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can't help but feel that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This man might just be able to become...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 16 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
